title: sykesia calycina
intro: Sykesia calycina, also known as the "Hooked Horned Orchid," is a type of orchid species endemic to the Western Ghats in India. The medicinal properties of Sykesia calycina include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Sykesia calycina can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
